report.msg: Market Raccoon — Overlay Rendering Validation (v2)
Target: http://localhost:8090
Validation strategy:
1. Color detection: scan for Viridis (heatmap) and red/green (VPVR) pixel signatures
2. Toggle diff: click HM/VP toggles and measure pixel change %
3. Per-TF: verify overlays render across all 9 timeframes
4. Stress: rapid TF cycling, compare mode, stream switching
=== Phase 1: Page Load + Data Accumulation ===
Waiting 15s for WASM + WS + data accumulation...
PASS WS-1: WebSocket connected
=== Phase 2: Overlay ON/OFF Pixel-Diff Per TF ===
Method: capture chart pixels with overlays ON, toggle OFF, diff.
If diff% > 0.5%, overlay is proven to render.
Chart sample region: 96,54 1248x486
VPVR sample region:  864,54 480x486
TF 1s : HM=RENDERING     (13057 viridis px, 2.15%)  VP=RENDERING     (2514r+6236g px, 1.08%+2.67%)
TF 5s : HM=RENDERING     (17472 viridis px, 2.88%)  VP=RENDERING     (4670r+10060g px, 2.00%+4.31%)
TF 1m : HM=RENDERING     (17506 viridis px, 2.89%)  VP=RENDERING     (8079r+6537g px, 3.46%+2.80%)
TF 5m : HM=RENDERING     (19049 viridis px, 3.14%)  VP=RENDERING     (9514r+3300g px, 4.08%+1.41%)
TF 15m: HM=RENDERING     (12487 viridis px, 2.06%)  VP=RENDERING     (8750r+13023g px, 3.75%+5.58%)
TF 30m: HM=RENDERING     (21042 viridis px, 3.47%)  VP=RENDERING     (11230r+20369g px, 4.81%+8.73%)
TF 1h : HM=RENDERING     (12290 viridis px, 2.03%)  VP=RENDERING     (13369r+1957g px, 5.73%+0.84%)
TF 4h : HM=RENDERING     (8258 viridis px, 1.36%)  VP=RENDERING     (28274r+7403g px, 12.12%+3.17%)
TF 1d : HM=RENDERING     (8260 viridis px, 1.36%)  VP=RENDERING     (28110r+7403g px, 12.05%+3.17%)
Heatmap overlay detected: 9/9 TFs (1s, 5s, 1m, 5m, 15m, 30m, 1h, 4h, 1d)
VPVR overlay detected:    9/9 TFs (1s, 5s, 1m, 5m, 15m, 30m, 1h, 4h, 1d)
PASS HM-RENDER-1: Heatmap rendering on 3/3 short TFs: 1s, 5s, 1m
PASS VP-RENDER-1: VPVR rendering on 3/3 short TFs: 1s, 5s, 1m
PASS HM-RENDER-2: Heatmap rendering on 9/9 TFs
PASS VP-RENDER-2: VPVR rendering on 9/9 TFs
=== Phase 3: Overlay Toggle ON/OFF Pixel-Diff ===
Method: capture with overlays ON → click HM toggle OFF → diff → click back ON.
Toolbar scan: rightEdge=1917, canvasW=1920
Toggle positions (canvas-relative): HM≈1832, VP≈1866, Vol≈1900, Y≈44
Heatmap toggle diff: 11268 pixels changed (1.86%)
PASS HM-TOGGLE: Heatmap toggle produced 1.9% pixel change — overlay is rendering
VPVR toggle diff: 6308 pixels changed (1.04%)
PASS VP-TOGGLE: VPVR toggle produced 1.0% pixel change — overlay is rendering
=== Phase 4: Rapid TF Stress + Compare Mode ===
PASS STRESS-1: Rapid TF cycling (18 switches) — no errors
PASS COMPARE-1: Compare mode + TF switch — no errors
PASS PANIC-1: No WASM panics
Total console errors across all phases: 0
Total console messages: 518
VALIDATION SUMMARY
Passed: 10
Bugs: 0
Screenshots: 16
All checks passed.

consoleMessages.text: Canvas2D: Multiple readback operations using getImageData are faster with the willReadFrequently attribute set to true. See: https://html.spec.whatwg.org/multipage/canvas.html#concept-canvas-will-read-frequently
